final:
module top_module(
    input signed [15:0] number,
    output reg [15:0] abs_value
);always @* begin
        if (number < 0) begin
            abs_value <= ~number + 1;
        end
        else begin
            abs_value <= number;
        end
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      abs_value <= number - 1;
    end
  end

endmodule
